idea.title: Critter Cove
idea.hook: Drop critters onto the grid — line up 3 of a kind and they evolve into a bigger beast. Plan your space; when the board fills with no merge left, the run ends.
idea.prototype: Grid triple-merge: tap to place critters, 3-of-a-tier merge up an 8-10 step evolution ladder, board-fill lose, storage slot, blockers + specials escalate the run.
idea.why_novel: Portfolio has Suika physics-merge + merge-battlers but no grid placement triple-merge; merge is our biggest market gap in a high-retention-ceiling genre.
idea.lose_condition: board full with no legal merge

sources.title: Merge Dale
sources.snippet: Top portal merge title; #1 CTR archetype puzzle_objects (weight 18855) and idle_tycoon today.

sources.title: Gossip Harbor: Merge & Story
sources.snippet: Merge-2 on a grid; tight 8-game clone cluster on Play = validated, monetisable mechanic.

sources.title: Travel Town - Merge Adventure
sources.snippet: Combine items into better items; merge-adventure is a durable grossing genre.

sources.title: Light incremental merge — next-item preview tripled session length
sources.snippet: Players report a visible tier ladder + next-item preview + spatial pressure is what makes merge retain; no energy timers.

synthesizer_brief: Leader picked a grid triple-merge (Triple Town loop + Merge Dale cozy aesthetic) as the single strongest buildable idea: convergent CTR + Google Play GROSSING merge signal, a high-retention-ceiling genre, and a genuine portfolio gap (no grid triple-merge shipped).

alternatives.title: Glitch Stack
alternatives.hook: Match-3 column dropper with a screen glitch that reorders columns on a chain pop.
alternatives.why_novel: One shader effect carries a plain dropper.

alternatives.title: Deepvein (idle mining clicker)
alternatives.hook: Dig blocks, upgrade tools, descend deeper for rarer ore.
alternatives.why_novel: r/incremental momentum, but idle is a weaker 10-min ACTIVE loop — better as an iteration mechanic.

alternatives.title: Skillet (merge & cook)
alternatives.hook: Merge ingredients to fill cozy recipe orders.
alternatives.why_novel: Merge with an order goal; leans cross-session/energy so deferred.

alternatives.title: Coin Sort
alternatives.hook: Sort & merge coins into stacks by value.
alternatives.why_novel: satisfying_cleanup CTR but lower ceiling than full grid-merge.
